message:
feat(conformance): Complete bubbles conformance tests for filepicker, cursor, and keybinding

- Add 11 filepicker conformance tests: new, set_directory, allowed_types,
  show_hidden, height, dir_allowed, keybindings, format_size, cursor,
  sort_order, empty_view
- Add 4 cursor mode conformance tests: cursorblink, cursorstatic, cursorhide, cursor_model
- Add 4 keybinding conformance tests: simple, multi, disabled, toggle

All 83 bubbles conformance tests now pass with 0 failures and 0 skipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
